title: agropyron repens subvar. pubescens
intro: Agropyron repens subvar. pubescens, commonly known as creeping bentgrass, is a type of perennial grass that belongs to the wheat grass family. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Agropyron repens subvar. pubescens include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, it is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to promote overall well-being and alleviate various health issues.
